title: THIA skill flat snapshot and thinker-pack
availability: Capsule is in D-ND_LAB. Full flat skill files must be provided separately or vendored before BODY use.
use_when: A new runtime needs portable cognitive skills without full KPhi1.
A chat/coder environment needs a thinker-pack style install.
The meta-lab needs to compare current skill catalog against older THIA taxonomy.
A domain needs one or two flat skills as support, not an entire kernel.
do_not_use_for: Assuming every flat skill is current runtime authority.
Using retired skills without checking status.
Replacing D-ND_LAB skill diagnostics with a flat list.
Loading all skills into context before selecting by movement.

distilled_patterns.summary: Plane 0 Kernel MM, Plane 1 portable cognitive skills, Plane 2 THIA-bound operative skills, Plane 3 bridges/connectors.
Portable cognitive pack for chat systems: Kernel MM plus cognitive skills, without THIA infrastructure dependency.
Single-file agent_skills_*.md format can be copied into runtime environments more easily than structured repos.
Some files are historical/retired; capsule use requires diagnostic status before activation.

candidate_sources.use: portable Kernel MM seed if explicitly needed
flat skill bodies after candidate selection

contamination_risks: Flat snapshot may lag behind current THIA/D-ND_LAB runtime.
Retired files may still be present.
Plane 2 operative skills may assume THIA infrastructure unavailable to a public install.
Thinker-pack can be useful but too broad for a narrow domain Lab.
